allow: Bash(npm --version)

PowerShell(winget --version)
PowerShell(winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements)
PowerShell(winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS --source winget --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements)
